case_title: CIVIL SERVICE EMPLOYEES INSURANCE COMPANY VS ACTION ADJUSTERS & APPRAISERS

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,722.00 FILED BY CIVIL SERVICE EMPLOYEES INSURANCE COMPANY AS TO DEFENDANT ACTION ADJUSTERS & APPRAISERS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-28-1996 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPT C
CONT.REQ.OF DEF.RECVD TOO LATE. HRG.WAS AT 10:00AM
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT CIVIL SERVICE EMPLOYEES INSURANCE COMPANY STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION MAY-28-1996, CONTINUED BY COURT TO JUL-09-1996 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT C
CERTIFIED MAIL TO WILLIAM MANSPEAKER, OWN/IND ACTION ADJUSTERS & APPRAISERS RETUNED, UNCLAIMED.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT ACTION ADJUSTERS & APPRAISERS

CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY ACTION ADJUSTERS & APPRAISERS AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT CIVIL SERVICE EMPLOYEES INSURANCE COMPANY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-09-1996 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT C
CORRESPONDENCE FROM JIM WILLIAMSON HOME OFFICE MGR CIVIL SERVICE EMPL INS. CO. FILED.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CIVIL SERVICE EMPLOYEES INSURANCE COMPANY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ACTION ADJUSTERS & APPRAISERS $2,722.00 PRINCIPAL, $104.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,826.00, JUDGMENT FOR PLFT IS WITHOUT PREJUDICE TO DEFT ON HIS DEFENDANT'S CLAIM. JUDGMENT RENDERED 5/28/96. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
